notes:
New in v2.8.0:
- Full OpenAI workflow — the Claude connection is gone; text, vision and images all run on your OpenAI key (enter it once in Settings, it survives updates).
- Scene continuity — the first frame of each scene is an anchor and the rest of the scene matches its light, location and colours.
- Assets aware of each other — locations render first, characters and products are lit inside the location, and day/night variants keep the exact same place.
- No phantom products — a product only appears when a product asset is actually in the shot.
- Add or remove shots straight from the Board (+ / x on each frame).
- Global director note on the Board — one instruction applied to every shot.
- Stronger, prioritised reference handling.
